Dana Inc. (NYSE: DAN) to join UBS Global Industrials and Transportation Conference on Dec 4, 2024 with CFO Timothy Kraus.

The event will commence at 12:10 p.m. EST, featuring Dana's Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Timothy Kraus.

news.headline: Global PPE distribution market expected to reach $48.57 billion by 2030 due to safety awareness and industry growth.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of December 2, 2024, the market for distributing Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) is experiencing segmentation based on various types including Hearing Protection, Protective Clothing, Respiratory Protection, Protective Footwear, Fall Protection, and Hand Protection. The distribution market is further categorized by application areas such as construction, healthcare, manufacturing, oil & gas, and others. This differentiation in the market reflects the growing emphasis on workplace safety.

news.headline: AI Infrastructure market to reach $394.46 billion by 2030 with a 19.4% CAGR from 2024 - $135.81 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of December 2, 2024, market analysis reveals a significant projected growth in the AI Infrastructure sector. Starting at USD 135.81 billion in 2024, it is anticipated to potentially reach USD 394.46 billion by 2030. This expansion signifies a forecasted Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 19.4% within the timeframe of 2024 to 2030. These developments highlight the sector’s potential for substantial advancement in the coming years.

Addenda Capital partners with OneVest for wealth management, enhances Private Wealth division with advanced technology.
news.summary: A prominent sustainable investment management firm, Addenda Capital, based in Toronto, has recently chosen OneVest as its wealth management software provider. The selection of OneVest, a cutting-edge technology company, aligns with Addenda Capital’s strategic vision to grow and improve its Private Wealth division. The partnership will enable Addenda Capital to leverage OneVest’s comprehensive platform, encompassing services like onboarding, client and advisor portals, portfolio management, fees and billing systems, reporting tools, and more. This move demonstrates Addenda Capital’s commitment to evolving and enhancing its wealth management services through advanced technological solutions.

BitGo enters retail market with new trading platform, expanding its services beyond stablecoins and native tokens.
news.summary: Following its expansion into stablecoins and native tokens, BitGo is now shifting its focus towards retail clients. The company, known for its secure storage solutions for cryptocurrencies, has made significant strides in the industry as it continues to attract a wide range of customers. With a growing number of users, BitGo is now aiming to provide its services to individual retail clients looking to invest in digital assets. This strategic shift comes as BitGo looks to capitalize on the increasing popularity of cryptocurrencies among the general public.

Duke Energy provides $300,000 in bill assistance to Indiana customers, supporting 2,000 households with $650,000 in the last year.
news.summary: Duke Energy Indiana is offering qualifying customers an annual account credit of up to $300. In the past year, Duke Energy has provided over $650,000 in energy bill assistance to 2,000 Indiana households. This initiative was announced in Plainfield, Ind., on December 2, 2024.

Global and US Medical and Recreational Cannabis Database offers data on cannabis laws in 75 countries and all 50 states.
news.summary: ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Global Medical and Recreational Cannabis Database" in its offerings. This database contains crucial data on the legal status of medical and recreational cannabis in 75 countries worldwide. It covers regulations related to production, licensing, consumption, and prescription of these products. Moreover, the dataset includes an examination of the potential for alterations to the existing regulatory framework.

The analysis provides valuable data for industry stakeholders, with detailed information on the market's current state and future projections.

news.headline: Pat Gelsinger, Intel CEO, resigns amidst company's challenges in chipmaking.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has reached a staggering 5.4 million worldwide, with the death toll surpassing 345,000. The United States remains the most affected country with over 1.6 million cases and 97,000 deaths. Despite these numbers, there are signs of hope as various countries have started to ease lockdown restrictions in an effort to revive their economies. However, health officials continue to emphasize the importance of practicing social distancing and following safety guidelines to prevent a resurgence of the virus. The global economy has been severely impacted by the pandemic, with millions of businesses facing closure and widespread job losses. Governments around the world are implementing relief measures to support their citizens during these challenging times. The situation remains fluid, and experts are urging vigilance and caution as the world navigates through this unprecedented crisis.

news.headline: Global oligonucleotides market to hit US$13.1 billion by 2034, growing at CAGR of 11.9% driven by biotech, gene therapy. Major players include Agilent Technologies, Thermo Fisher Scientific, with focus on innovative therapies.
news.summary: The global oligonucleotides market is forecasted to grow at a CAGR of 11.9% from 2024 to 2034, with a value of US$ 3.7 billion in 2023 expected to reach over US$ 13.1 billion by 2034. The market is being driven by the increasing adoption of oligonucleotides in molecular biology and gene therapy, as well as advancements in biotechnology. The rising number of FDA-approved oligonucleotide drugs for genetic disorders, cancers, and viral infections is a key factor propelling market expansion. Oligonucleotides, short DNA or RNA molecules, are utilized in gene therapy, diagnostics, and molecular biology due to their ability to hybridize with specific nucleotide sequences. Key market players include Agilent Technologies, Thermo Fisher Scientific, and Merck, among others, who are focusing on expanding product offerings and developing innovative therapies. Industry developments include Agilent Technologies launching new oligonucleotide synthesis products and Thermo Fisher Scientific acquiring Phadia to enhance genetic testing capabilities.

Cigo integrates with NetSuite for better delivery efficiency and real-time fulfillment visibility.
news.summary: In Montreal on December 2, 2024, delivery logistics company Cigo revealed its new collaboration with NetSuite. By merging NetSuite's robust order management features with Cigo Tracker's cutting-edge delivery tracking system, clients can now benefit from an integrated solution. The integration promises to streamline operations and enhance efficiency for businesses. This move showcases Cigo's commitment to innovation in the sector.

news.headline: Red Hat's Ansible Automation Platform Service now offered on AWS Marketplace, aiding in managing hybrid cloud infrastructure.
news.summary: Red Hat, a prominent provider of open-source solutions, has launched the Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform Service on AWS in the AWS Marketplace. This managed offering simplifies the management of hybrid cloud infrastructure for customers. By streamlining intricate tasks, it reduces potential errors, enhancing operational efficiency. The service provides customers with increased flexibility in managing their infrastructure.

news.headline: PharmaCielo Cannabis Co. sees 270% YoY revenue increase in Q3 to CA$1.3 million, eyes profitability by 2025.
news.summary: PharmaCielo Ltd. (TSXV:PCLO) (OTC:PCLOF) disclosed its financial and operational outcomes for the three and nine months ending on Sept. 30, 2024. The Toronto-headquartered cannabis products company reported revenue of CA$1.3 million ($927,772) for the third quarter, marking an increase from CA$352,000 in the same period last year. Total revenues for the nine-month period amounted to CA$2.4 million, a rise from CA$1.3 million in 2023. Chairman and CEO, Marc Lustig, highlighted the company's substantial revenue growth, successful expansion into new international markets, and ongoing efforts to cut costs for improved operational efficiency. Additionally, Lustig emphasized PharmaCielo's strategic positioning in various regions and diversification of its product lineup beyond CBD isolate.

Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) price drops 5.09% to $226.14 in 24 hours, down 6.0% in past week.

This decline adds to its one-week negative trend, during which it has seen a 6.0% decrease from $241.54 to its current value. The chart illustrates the price changes and volatility of Solana over the past 24 hours on the left side. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: HOPE IN SIGHT hosts 2nd annual gala at G Prime Steakhouse in Wilmington on Sunday to raise funds against Dry Eye.
news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina, on December 2, 2024, a local organization called HOPE IN SIGHT is hosting its second annual gala. The event, titled "Cheers for Tears: Fund the Fight Against Dry Eye," will be held at the renowned G Prime Steakhouse located at 1981 Eastwood Road. Attendees will enjoy music, mimosas, and support the mission of the organization.

news.headline: Trashie launches Tech Take Back Box for electronic waste disposal. Allows people to responsibly get rid of old tech.
news.summary: In a recent development on December 2, 2024, in New York City, Trashie, the renowned recycling and rewards platform, unveiled its latest initiative to address electronic waste. The company introduced the Tech Take Back Box, a convenient solution for individuals to properly dispose of outdated electronic devices such as phones, cords, chargers, and laptops. This innovation aims to encourage more people to participate in recycling electronics and contribute to reducing environmental impact from improper disposal. The expansion of Trashie's services signifies a step towards increasing awareness and engagement in sustainable practices.

news.headline: Ultra AV's antivirus engine receives boosts in machine learning models, heuristic detection, and operational enhancements to ensure improved efficacy and efficiency. Pango Group's brand introduces upgrades for best-in-class user experience. (Character count: 227)
news.summary: Pango Group unveiled on December 2, 2024 that its flagship antivirus brand UltraAV has introduced improvements aimed at providing a top-notch user experience. The upgrades include advanced machine learning models, heuristic detection, and operational enhancements. These enhancements are designed to bolster the antivirus protection capabilities of UltraAV, ensuring better safeguarding against threats to user devices. The company is focused on delivering enhanced performance and security to its customers.

news.headline: Lone Star acquires Carrier's fire business for $3 billion, forming Kidde Global Solutions; creating trusted fire safety brands.
news.summary: Lone Star Funds confirmed the acquisition of Carrier Global Corporation’s Commercial and Residential Fire business for $3 billion. The business will now operate independently as Kidde Global Solutions, merging renowned fire and life safety brands.

news.headline: One Source in Raleigh, NC rebrands to emphasize tech leadership support. Offers expanded services in networking and cybersecurity.
news.summary: One Source, a tech company based in Raleigh, North Carolina, has launched a rebranding effort to emphasize its dedication to assisting technology leaders in navigating the challenges of the modern digital environment. Renowned for its top-notch services in technology expense management and managed security, the company has unveiled a fresh appearance and communication strategy reflecting its expanded proficiency across a wider array of technologies such as networking, customer experience solutions, and data center management. This initiative signals One Source's commitment to providing comprehensive tech solutions.

news.headline: EDX appoints new CEO Tony Acuña-Rohter, with former CEO Jamil Nazarali as Executive Chair. Acuña-Rohter was previously Chief Technology Officer.
news.summary: In Hoboken, New Jersey, EDX Markets Holding Co., Inc. (EDX) revealed that Jamil Nazarali, the existing CEO, will now serve as the Executive Chair of the EDX Board. Tony Acuña-Rohter has been appointed as the new CEO. Acuña-Rohter, who joined in 2022, previously held the role of Chief Technology Officer at EDX, overseeing technology and information security operations. The transition marks a significant change in leadership within the company, with EDX being recognized as a prominent digital asset technology firm offering an institution-only trading venue paired with a central clearinghouse.

news.headline: Lumin Digital gets $160M in growth funding to boost business expansion.
news.summary: Lumin Digital, based in San Ramon, California, has secured significant funding to support its expanding operations and maintain its positive trajectory. The company, known for its advanced digital banking solutions, revealed today that it has successfully raised more than $160 million in growth equity financing. This capital injection will enable Lumin Digital to further accelerate its business growth and capitalize on existing momentum in the industry.

news.headline: Trellix gains AWS Generative AI Competency in Las Vegas, offering faster detection & response with Trellix Helix Connect.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Trellix, a cybersecurity firm, has earned the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Generative AI Competency for its Trellix Helix Connect platform. Utilizing Amazon Bedrock, Trellix Helix Connect, coupled with Trellix Wise, offers users accelerated detection, streamlined investigation, and enhanced response abilities to bolster operational resilience. This solution is adept at autonomously conducting a comprehensive initial investigation.

news.headline: Uptiq.AI acquires UpSwot to strengthen enterprise AI platform with enhanced data integration for financial institutions.
news.summary: In a recent development, Uptiq, based in Dallas, has successfully acquired UpSwot. This strategic move aims to bolster Uptiq's AI platform by incorporating advanced data integration capabilities. By doing so, Uptiq seeks to cater specifically to financial institutions, offering them enhanced tools to extract actionable insights. This acquisition marks a significant step forward for Uptiq as it looks to expand its reach and services.

news.headline: FourKites resolves two legal disputes with project44 over employee hiring and emails after five years. Glad to move forward.
news.summary: Chicago-based FourKites recently settled two legal disputes with project44. The first issue stemmed from FourKites objecting to project44 hiring two of its employees. The second matter involved project44's prior complaint about emails sent by FourKites CEO Mathew Elenjickal to three individuals connected to project44 five years ago. Elenjickal expressed relief at resolving these conflicts, stating, "We are glad to put these disputes behind us."

news.headline: Dow Jones and small caps rise over 1%, Nvidia rallies, but Google stock impacts tech sector.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index showed strong performance, leading the major indexes. Nvidia stock experienced a late rally in trading hours despite a majority of the day in decline. The Dow Jones and small caps surged over 1%, but the tech sector was weighed down by Google stock. This information was covered live without mentioning the specific source.

news.headline: Canadian exports facing 25% tariff threat from incoming US president. Trudeau hopeful to prevent escalation.
news.summary: The president-elect has announced plans to implement a 25 percent tariff on all Canadian exports, but Prime Minister Trudeau is optimistic about preventing this measure from being implemented.
